title: bupleurum brevicaule
intro: Bupleurum brevicaule is a flowering plant species within the genus Bupleurum, commonly known as the dwarf hare's ear or small short-hair bupleurum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Bupleurum brevicaule include its ability to reduce fever, relieve joint pain, and support the immune system. Bupleurum brevicaule can be prepared as an herbal tea or supplement, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
